'''Prosperine Entertainment and Distilleries''' was a local company based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Algara II]]. The company also owned and operated the famous [[Club Prosperine]], an exclusive resort located on the continent of [[Kreesis]]. The [[Chief Executive Officer/Legends|Chief Executive Officer]] of the company was [[Dellin Sorth]], a member of [[Prosperines|the Prosperine]] social class.
